description: You are a regulatory affairs manager at a medical device company preparing a regulatory dossier for an AI-powered diagnostic software product (SaMD). Research the current regulatory landscape by locating official FDA guidance on SaMD or AI/ML from FDA.gov, identifying a relevant rule or notice in the Federal Register, and finding IMDRF guidance on SaMD classification or clinical evaluation. Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'FDA Regulatory Research' containing at least 6 bookmarks from these sources. Compile a regulatory requirements matrix at ~/Documents/samd_regulatory_matrix.txt that details FDA pre-market requirements, the IMDRF SaMD classification framework, and international harmonization notes.
